user_message_snippet: Write an email draft from max@posteo.de to [EMAIL

preprocessing.title: Email Draft About Broken Heater
preprocessing.chat_summary: User requests an email draft about a broken heater in their building

response:
Here is a draft email about the broken heater:

Subject: Broken Heater — Repair Status

Dear Sarah,

I am writing to follow up regarding the broken heater in our building. Could you please provide an update on when the repair is scheduled?

You can reach me at [PHONE_1_567] if you need to discuss this further.

Best regards,
Max
